use_cases: Animated hero section text with particle dispersal and reassembly effects on hover
Creative loading or transition states with floating particle animations
Landing page headlines with interactive text reveal that responds to mouse movement
ai_summary: A canvas-based particle text reveal component that creates a magical dispersion and reassembly effect. Text breaks into floating particles that respond to mouse movement and hover states, with configurable density, speed, and spread. Uses high-DPI canvas rendering for smooth animations on all devices.
